title: The Animal Assignment
mainIdea: Being human is special because people can learn, communicate, and achieve great things.

pages.text: Jayden's teacher asked the class to write about an animal they wanted to be.

question.text: Who is the main character in the story?

pages.text: Jayden researched many animals, including a fox, cougar, dolphin, koala, giraffe, and bull.

question.text: What did Jayden need to do?
options: Pick an animal for his assignment

pages.text: Each animal had something he liked, but each also had something he did not want.

options: He could not decide which animal to choose

pages.text: Jayden worried because he still could not decide. He continued researching and thinking carefully.

question.text: What did Jayden do to solve his problem?
options: He asked someone else to choose

pages.text: Finally, he chose to write about being a human because humans can learn, communicate, and create amazing things.

options: Jayden chose to be a dolphin
Jayden chose to be a human
Jayden did not finish the assignment

elements.correct: To choose an animal for his assignment
Every animal he researched had disadvantages
He kept researching and thinking carefully
distractors: He asked someone else to choose
He chose to be a dolphin
He did not finish the assignment
